team_name: Grove Apex - A solution that transforms tender evaluation from a manual, error-prone process into an intelligent, explainable, and auditable system, enabling faster and more reliable procurement decisions.
summary: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
optimization_claims: Automated extraction, analysis, and evaluation of tender and bidder documents
Modular design ensures scalability, maintainability, and flexibility
Use of LLMs with structured prompting for criteria extraction
OCR and text parsing for document processing
Balanced performance and accuracy using a hybrid rule-based + AI approach
